title: 30 Pcs Artificial Pine Picks, Wrapping Accessories Pine Cones Red Berry Stems Christmas Foliage for Present Wrapping Christmas Wreath Decorations DIY Xmas Crafts - 5 Styles
features: 【30 Pack Artificial Christmas Picks】Including 30 pcs Christmas red berry pine picks, 5 styles christmas foliage artificial with classic Xmas elements: holly red berries, pine cones, small pine branches, golden berries and green leaves, vivid color, realistic and beautiful, add festive atmosphere
【High Quality】These present wrapping accessories are made from high quality plastic, foam and polyester fabric, durable and reusable, and always stay vivid

【Colorful Christmas Decorations】Artificial christmas flowers and foliage are widely used to decorate Christmas trees, Christmas wreaths, gift packaging, table centerpieces, bouquets, floral arrangements etc. to become the finishing touch

【DIY Crafts & Easy to Shape】 Wired stem easy to be shaped and arranged on cards, favour boxes, gift bags and many other craft projects. These Christmas gift wrapping accessories will make beautiful accents on your Christmas present wrapping

【SUITABLE SIZE】The length of pine twigs is about 10cm, 5 different designs are in the pack, fit for decorating Christmas trees, making wreaths or Christmas gift decorations, 100% satisfaction guarantee
